phrases.intent_en: Ask where to drop off luggage
phrases.cultural_note: Luggage storage is a common service for tourists exploring the city.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, nos cacifos de armazenamento.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOOSH kuh-SEE-foosh DIH uh-ruh-muh-zeh-nuh-MAYNG-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the luggage storage lockers.

responses.english: Good morning, at the luggage storage lockers.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOOSH kuh-SEE-foosh DIH uh-ruh-muh-zeh-nuh-MAYNG-too.
responses.local: Bom dia, nos cacifos de armazenamento.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Fado de Coimbra audio booth is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a cabine de áudio do Fado de Coimbra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH kuh-BEE-nih DIH OW-deeoo DOO FAH-doo DIH KOOEEMB-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Fado de Coimbra is a unique academic musical tradition, distinct from Lisbon's style.

likely_response.local: A cabine de áudio do Fado de Coimbra está disponível neste posto de turismo. O atendente de turismo pode indicar-lhe a localização exata.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH kuh-BEE-nih DIH OW-deeoo DOO FAH-doo DIH KOOEEMB-ruh ehs-TAH deesh-poo-NEE-vehl NEHSH-tih POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo. AW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR-LYIH AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN eh-ZAH-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: The Fado de Coimbra audio booth is available at this tourist office. The tourism attendant can show you its exact location.

responses.english: The Fado de Coimbra audio booth is available at this tourist office. The tourism attendant can show you its exact location.
responses.phonetic: AH kuh-BEE-nih DIH OW-deeoo DOO FAH-doo DIH KOOEEMB-ruh ehs-TAH deesh-poo-NEE-vehl NEHSH-tih POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo. AW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR-LYIH AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN eh-ZAH-tuh.
responses.local: A cabine de áudio do Fado de Coimbra está disponível neste posto de turismo. O atendente de turismo pode indicar-lhe a localização exata.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to drop off luggage
phrases.text_local: Onde posso deixar a minha bagagem?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo day-SHAHR AH MEE-nyuh buh-GAH-zhayng?
phrases.cultural_note: Luggage drop-off is common at tourist offices near historic districts for day-trippers.

likely_response.local: Pode usar os cacifos para bagagem.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih oo-ZAHR OOSH kuh-SEE-foosh PUH-ruh buh-GAH-zhayng.
likely_response.translation_en: You can use the luggage lockers.

responses.english: You can use the luggage lockers.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih oo-ZAHR OOSH kuh-SEE-foosh PUH-ruh buh-GAH-zhayng.
responses.local: Pode usar os cacifos para bagagem.

phrases.text_local: Pode sugerir um restaurante típico aqui perto?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih soo-zhih-REER OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo uh-KEE PEHR-too?

likely_response.local: Sim, peça recomendações ao nosso atendente de turismo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEEN, PEH-suh reh-koo-mayng-duh-SOHNYSH OW NAW-soo uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, ask our tourist office attendant for recommendations.

responses.english: Yes, ask our tourist office attendant for recommendations.
responses.phonetic: SEEN, PEH-suh reh-koo-mayng-duh-SOHNYSH OW NAW-soo uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo.
responses.local: Sim, peça recomendações ao nosso atendente de turismo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Fado de Coimbra audio booth is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a cabine de áudio do Fado de Coimbra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-BEE-nih DIH OW-deeoo DOO FAH-doo DIH KOOEEMB-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Fado de Coimbra audio booth is a specific attraction within the tourist office.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao atendente de turismo no balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the tourism attendant at the information counter.

responses.english: Ask the tourism attendant at the information counter.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Pergunte ao atendente de turismo no balcão de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Fado de Coimbra audio booth is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a cabine de áudio do Fado de Coimbra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-BEE-nih DIH OW-deeoo DOO FAH-doo DIH KOOEEMB-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The audio booth offers samples of the local fado style.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent a bike
phrases.text_local: Bom dia, onde posso alugar uma bicicleta?
phrases.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OHNG-dih PAW-soo uh-loo-GAHR OO-muh bee-seek-LEH-tuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Bike rental is available at the payment terminal; no reservation needed.

likely_response.local: Ao lado da entrada, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW LAH-doo DUH ayngt-RAH-duh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the entrance, on the right.

responses.english: Next to the entrance, on the right.
responses.phonetic: OW LAH-doo DUH ayngt-RAH-duh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.local: Ao lado da entrada, à direita.
